info.english_meaning: to learnto practise to study to gain knowledge
info.hindI_arTa: vidyA prApta karanA aByAsa karanA aDyayana karanA sIKanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: SikzaterjijYAsAyAm ' iti vArtikaM niyamArTam ityaBiprayatnaH  ayaM DAtuH SikzABinnArTe parasmEpadI iti kzIrasvAmipraBftayaH AhuH  kintu nEtat vArtikaM niyamArTam iti kEyawanyAsapadamaYjarIDAtuvfttyAdizu spazwam  ataH sarvatra Atmanepadam eva iti sidDAntaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ASikzAyE praSninam' (tE0 brA0 344) alpA SikzA ASikzA ANIzadarTe
'kriyAsvapi ca sarvAsu viSezAnaByaSikzayat' (BA0 Adi0 22173) aByaSikzayat agrAhayat tezu viSezezvaBivyanayat
'catuzpAdaM DanurvedaM SastragrAmaM sasaNgraham acireREva kAlena gurustAvaByaSikzayat' (hari0 2337).. aBiH sAkalye
'rAjAnamupaSikzasva jyezWaM BrAtaramISvaram' (BA0 ASrama0 1114) upaSikzasva upetya Sikzasva vedyamupAdatsvetyAha
'priyeRevEnO tadDAmnA parokzamupaSikzati' (paYca0 brA0 1424) saNgraheRAdatte svAyattaM karoti
'yadyenaM punarupaSikzeyuH' (tE0 brA0 2322) enaM nirAkftaM puruzaM yadi punarapi svIkuryurityarTaH
'samADinopaSikzanto brahmalokaM sanAtanam' (BA0 anu0 9323) ihodAhftizu SikzatirupAdAnamAtre vartate
'evaM mayA'strARyupaSikzitAni SakrAcca vAtAcca SivAcca sAkzAt' (BA0 vana0 16512) upaSikzitAni upasadya SikzitAni
